targets.rawSql:
SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, groupUniqArray(profile_id) AS `Profils`, anyLast(mode) AS `Mode`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(max(observed_at), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)`, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS `Âge minutes`, sum(decision_count) AS `Décisions`, sum(trade_count) AS `Trades`, sum(skip_count) AS `Skips`, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net`, avg(roi) AS `ROI` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY strategy_id ORDER BY `Dernière observation` DESC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS `PnL net` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' / ', profile_id) AS series, avg(roi) AS `ROI` FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' trades') AS series, sum(trade_count) AS value FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY time, series UNION ALL SELECT toStartOfInterval(observed_at, INTERVAL 5 minute) AS time, concat(strategy_id, ' blocages') AS series, sum(skip_count) AS value FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY time, series ORDER BY time

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  run_id AS `Run / exécution`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  token_id AS `Token`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  decision_status AS `Décision`,
  skip_reason AS `Raison de skip`,
  edge AS `Edge`,
  limit_price AS `Prix limite`,
  source_ok AS `Source OK`,
  orderbook_ok AS `Carnet OK`,
  risk_ok AS `Risque OK`,
  blocker AS `Blocage`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT market_id AS `Marché`, strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, anyLast(edge) AS `Edge`, anyLast(limit_price) AS `Prix limite`, anyLast(source_ok) AS `Source OK`, anyLast(orderbook_ok) AS `Carnet OK`, anyLast(risk_ok) AS `Risque OK`, anyLast(blocker) AS `Blocage`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(max(observed_at), 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière observation (Paris)` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) GROUP BY market_id, strategy_id, profile_id ORDER BY `Dernière observation` DESC

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  run_id AS `Run / exécution`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  token_id AS `Token`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  paper_order_id AS `Ordre paper`,
  side AS `Côté`,
  status AS `Statut`,
  price AS `Prix`,
  size AS `Taille`,
  spend_usdc AS `Montant USDC`,
  paper_only AS `Paper uniquement`,
  live_order_allowed AS `Live autorisé`
FROM prediction_core.paper_orders WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  run_id AS `Run / exécution`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  token_id AS `Token`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  execution_event_id AS `Événement exécution`,
  event_type AS `Type événement`,
  mode AS `Mode`,
  paper_only AS `Paper uniquement`,
  live_order_allowed AS `Live autorisé`,
  raw AS `Brut`
FROM prediction_core.execution_events WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT formatDateTime(toTimeZone(p.observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation paper (Paris)`, p.run_id AS `Run / exécution`, p.market_id AS `Marché`, p.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, p.profile_id AS `Profil`, p.paper_order_id AS `Ordre paper`, p.status AS `Statut paper`, p.price AS `Prix paper`, p.size AS `Taille paper` FROM prediction_core.paper_orders p WHERE $__timeFilter(p.observed_at) ORDER BY p.observed_at DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Comparaison paper / live pour cette stratégie

targets.rawSql:
SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, if(blocker = '', skip_reason, blocker) AS `Raison`, count() AS `Nombre` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) AND (blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') GROUP BY strategy_id, profile_id, `Raison` ORDER BY `Nombre` DESC

SELECT formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`, strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, profile_id AS `Profil`, market_id AS `Marché`, raw AS `Brut` FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(run_id, '${run_id:regex}')
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  ) ORDER BY observed_at DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT strategy_id AS `Stratégie`, enabled AS `Activée`, mode AS `Mode configuré`, allow_live AS `Live autorisé config`, settings AS `Configuration`, formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Dernière config (Paris)`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id) AS `API config`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/enable') AS `API activer`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/disable') AS `API désactiver`, concat('/strategies/config/', strategy_id, '/mode') AS `API mode` FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs FINAL WHERE match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}') ORDER BY observed_at DESC
